svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

PageInformation + document shell" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#2563EB;fillColor=#DBEAFE;fontColor=#1E3A8A;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="50" y="90" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="builder-layer" value="Builder layer - tags + attributes + styles" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#7C3AED;fillColor=#EDE9FE;fontColor=#4C1D95;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="290" y="90" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="ecosystem-layer" value="Ecosystem layer - Bootstrap + effects + docs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#059669;fillColor=#D1FAE5;fontColor=#064E3B;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="530" y="90" width="180" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-1" value="" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6B7280;" edge="1" parent="1" source="page-layer" target="builder-layer"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-2" value="" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6B7280;" edge="1" parent="1" source="builder-layer" target="ecosystem-layer"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="Higher-level packages reuse the same lifecycle instead of owning the final document shell." style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=13;fontColor=#374151;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="80" y="200" width="600" height="30" as="geometry" /></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: Higher-level packages reuse the same lifecycle instead of owning the final document shell.
